absorption: ASK absorption detected at VAH (62826.5). Buyers are struggling to push price higher despite volume, indicating sellers are absorbing the buying pressure.
dom_observation: Sellers are defending the VAH level, with notable stacked asks visible above, particularly at 62900. The buying momentum seen in the tape is being absorbed without significant price appreciation.
reasoning: Fiyat, VAH seviyesinde alıcıların momentum kaybetmesi (negatif delta), ASK absorption ve bearish CVD uyumsuzluğu ile birlikte reddedilme (rejection) sinyalleri veriyor.
